name: OWOX

auth.notes: Self-hosted/local app credentials; storage auth varies by warehouse. BigQuery supports service-account JSON or Google OAuth; source connector auth varies by the upstream API.

rateLimits: No public OWOX platform REST API rate limit applies; connector jobs inherit upstream source API and warehouse limits. Connector SDK exposes retry hooks and treats 429 as retryable.
pagination: Connector/source-specific. The connector SDK documents next-page URL loops and optional per-endpoint limits; Data Mart exports deliver results to configured storages/destinations.
notes: Generated from the Tier 2/Tier 3 parallel specialist scout wave.
Use source links to refresh endpoint-level details before implementation.
